data.name: Innocence Or Money | Season 2 | Episode 1
data.detailed_description:
Jennifer's adventures continue...

Jennifer's adventures continue in the long-awaited second season of Innocence Or Money. What decisions have you made for Jennifer and where have you been leading her?

Continue to guide her down the path of innocence or money and witness the consequences that your decisions will bring to her life.

Season 2 includes many new and improved features to enhance the IoM experience further. For example:

Enhanced music player:




Season 2 includes a brand new, high-quality soundtrack and 100% original songs. Some of the innovations of the new music player are:

(1) Now, you can select whether you want the music to play in random order.
(2) Now, you can pause a song at any time and continue listening to it where you left off.
(3) The currently playing song will be displayed in the upper right corner of the player.

Season 2 includes an inventory system which will be used and expanded in the new episodes of the game:


The inventory system will be included in episode 1, and will become more and more useful in future episodes, allowing you to buy, use, etc.

The map will continue to expand with new locations during the development of the second season:


More locations and functionalities will be added to the map during the development of the second season.





In addition to new locations, there will also be new characters added to the story:

Multiple improvements:


Season 2 improves every aspect and creates a new foundation on which each episode of this new season will be built, allowing it to take the game to a new level. Even the already known locations have had improvements which will allow to add a new layer of interactivity. (With each episode, you will see how new functionality will be added to IoM)







Now available in 32 Languages:


The list of languages in which IoM is available has been further expanded. Season 2 will be available in 32 languages, and even more languages may be added during development.

Continue the story where you left off:


It is recommended to have played season 1 as season 2 is the continuation of the story, the game will start with a quiz for you to indicate the choices you made for Jennifer in season 1, once you select all the options, season 2 will start where season 1 ended.



Jennifer is waiting for you...

data.short_description: Jennifer's adventures continue in Season 2. You will remain at the helm of her life and you will be able to set her on a good path or definitely lead her into a world of unparalleled corruption...
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 愛沙尼亞語, 拉脫維亞文, 立陶宛文, 斯洛伐克語, 斯洛維尼亞語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or Superior
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
